testcase.name: test_no_unsafe_hybrid_sql_in_non_repo_bridges
testcase.failure:
def test_no_unsafe_hybrid_sql_in_non_repo_bridges(): items = _find_sql_in_bridges() bridge_files = {i["file"] for i in items} acceptable = {"ui_qml_bridge/library_doctor_bridge.py", "ui_qml_bridge/library_query_service.py", "ui_qml_bridge/diagnostics_bridge.py", "ui_qml_bridge/history_bridge.py", "ui_qml_bridge/global_search_bridge.py", "ui_qml_bridge/library_bridge.py"} unacceptable = bridge_files - acceptable > assert len(unacceptable) == 0, f"SQL in non-repository bridges: {unacceptable}" E AssertionError: SQL in non-repository bridges: {'ui_qml_bridge/diagnostics_repository.py'} E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len({'ui_qml_bridge/diagnostics_repository.py'})
tests/qml/test_hybrid_audit_execution.py:38: AssertionError
